title: Right Tool for the Job
constraints: You may not remove any existing tools
You may not modify the tool implementations
You may only change the tool descriptions and the system prompt
hints: The agent might be confused because tool descriptions are vague or overlapping
Make each tool description specific about what input it expects and what output it returns
Add explicit routing instructions in the system prompt: 'For weather queries, always use the weather_lookup tool. For general questions, use web_search.'

evaluationCriteria.label: Correct tool selection
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent consistently picks the right tool for each query type

evaluationCriteria.label: No unnecessary tool calls
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent doesn't call multiple tools when one would suffice

evaluationCriteria.label: Clear tool descriptions
evaluationCriteria.description: Each tool description clearly explains its purpose, expected input, and output

evaluationCriteria.label: All test queries pass
evaluationCriteria.description: Weather, calculator, and calendar queries all route to the correct tool
